Introduction
    Set in late Qing dynasty, Empress Ci Xi controls the Emperor from behind the curtain. Two step-brothers, one an imperial official and the other a eunuch, drift apart as their loyalties clash, straining their relationship.

Production companies: Xian Longrui Film And TV Culture Media Co.
